text.title: claude-messages-api Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether claude-messages-api applies. Root question + branches with concrete `when` observables, each leading to a core rule reference or skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the call site using `messages.create` / `messages.stream` directly, with mixed modalities, multi-turn, or streaming?

branch.conclusion: Wire full-content history per rule r2.
Wire image-first ordering per rule r4.
Wire PDF preflight per rule r5.
Wire delta-aware parser per rule r6.
Set max_tokens explicitly per rule r3.
Skip; this isn't a Messages-API discipline problem.

example.description: A multi-turn assistant using one weather tool keeps 400-ing on the second turn. Tree concludes rule r2 — append the full content list, not just text.
